extract.name: Shift U
extract.tagline: Talk to Joshua. Book a 25 minute discovery call, send a message, or get pointed at the right resource. No SDR funnel, no slide deck, no pressure.
extract.summary: Contact page for Shift U, an Edmonton, Alberta operator that sells AI workforce training programs plus a digital services stack (websites, paid ads, chat/voice agents, conversion systems). The page is a low-pressure contact/booking hub: book a 25 minute discovery call with Joshua or submit a message form, with a same-business-day reply promise.
extract.pricing: Training Programs: AI Operator Certification $7,500; Private Training $22,500; Workforce Transformation $55,000. Digital Services: Landing Page from $350; Full Website 3 to 10 pages (price not stated); Google and Meta Ads $300 a month; AI Chat Agent $150 to $250; Voice Agent (price not stated); Conversion System (price not stated).
included: Training programs: AI Operator Certification, Private Training, Workforce Transformation
Cohorts happen in person or on-site at your office
Google and Meta Ads management ($300 a month)
Conversion System: site plus CRM plus attribution
If not the right fit, you get three referrals out
keyPoints: Subheading: 'Book a 25 minute discovery call, send a message, or get pointed at the right resource. No SDR funnel, no slide deck, no pressure.'
CTA buttons: 'Book a discovery call' and 'Send a message instead'
Discovery call is 25 minutes, your agenda, with Joshua
'No prep, no sales pitch, no pressure'
'Same business day, before 5pm Mountain' reply window
'If we are not the right fit you get three referrals out'
Contact form fields: Your name, Work email, Company, 'What can we help with?' (dropdown), Budget or team size, 'Tell us what is going on' (text area), 'Send to the team' (submit button)
Team: Joshua = Sales and Discovery Lead; Marcus = Lead Facilitator; Adam = Account Manager
Hours: Mon to Fri, 9am to 5pm Mountain
Service area: Alberta, with remote work across Canada
extract.capgRemoved: Stripped grant/funding content found on the page: (1) Tagline originally read "AI workforce training and digital services for Alberta operators. CAJG-eligible programs and a digital stack tuned for revenue." — removed the "CAJG-eligible programs" clause. (2) "The Canada-Alberta Job Grant covers up to 66 percent of AI training, with up to $10,000 per trainee per year." — removed entirely. (3) "CAJG paperwork supported: Adam handles the grant application alongside the program enrollment." — removed the grant-application framing (kept Adam as Account Manager). (4) "CAJG-eligible programs" descriptor on training. No "funded through 2028" text was present. All CAPG/CAJG/Canada-Alberta Job Grant/66%/$10,000 per trainee/grant-funding wrapper removed; the underlying training programs and their real prices ($7,500 / $22,500 / $55,000) and digital service pricing were kept.

copy.seoTitle: Contact Shift U | Book a Call
copy.seoDescription: Book a call or get a quote. We build the website and the AI behind it. Fast replies, no pushy sales.

sections.headline: Let's build it together
sections.subhead: Book a call or get a quote. No pressure, no pitch.
sections.body: Tell us what you need: a website, a WhatsApp agent, or automations that cut the manual work. We reply fast and point you to the right next step.

sections.headline: Pick a time that works
sections.subhead: A short call beats a long email thread.
sections.body: Grab a slot and we'll talk through your goals, what to build first, and what it costs. You leave with a clear plan, even if you never hire us.
bullets: We reply within [PLACEHOLDER: X hours] on business days
You get a plan and a price, not a sales script
sections.flags: [PLACEHOLDER: confirm response time SLA for book_call promise]

sections.headline: Send the details, get a quote
sections.subhead: Four quick fields. We read every one.
sections.body: Fill the form and we'll come back with a real answer, not a generic auto-reply.
bullets: What you need (site, AI agent, automation)

sections.headline: Chat with us on WhatsApp
sections.body: Same place your customers would reach you. Ask anything and we'll answer like a human, fast.

sections.headline: Fast replies, zero pressure
sections.subhead: We answer quick and we never push.
sections.body: You get straight answers and a clear price. If we are not the right fit, we will tell you that too.
bullets: Real reply from a real person
Plain talk, no jargon, no hard sell
